OBJECTION TO PETITIONER'S PROPOSED ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO APPOINT ARBITRATORS FILED BY RESPONDENT THE PACIFIC EXCHANGE,INC.
REPLY TO RESPONDENT'S OBJCTION TO PROPOSED ORDER; AND PETITIONERS OBJECTION TO RESPONDENTS' PROPOSED ORDER
ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO APPOINT ARBITRATORS

PETITION IS GRANTED TO RESPONDENT PACIFIC EXCHANGE, INC.SAID RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO RESUME ADMINISTERING PETITIONERS ARBITRATION CLAIM. THAT RESPONDENTS SALOMOM SMITH BARNEY, INC. JAMES FREDRIKSON AND CLIFTON SANTIKUL ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.ALSO, PETTITIONERS ARE AWARDED THEIR COSTS EXPENDED IN THIS PROCEEDINGS AS AGAINST RESPONDENT PACIFIC EXCHANGE PER MEMO OF COSTS.
